Mrs. '''Tyerell''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] and the the wife of professional [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]]. She attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] that was held in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], during which she was widowed when Ratts died in a fatal crash. She had recently been released from a local hospital, presumably after giving birth to her youngest son, [[Doby Tyerell|Doby]]. Some time following her husband's death, her own brother-in-law sold her daughter, [[Djulla]], into slavery, to be bought by the notorious podracer [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]. Djulla would later be rescued by Anakin Skywalker. 

==Behind the scenes==
Mrs. Tyerell appears in the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] "Complete Podrace Grid Sequence" deleted scene from the film's [[2001]] DVD release. In the deleted scene, Podrace announcer [[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]] addresses her as "Mrs. Tyerell."
